basis_of_presentation.description: Financial statements prepared in accordance with GAAP. Includes all adjustments consisting of normal recurring accruals.

use_of_estimates.description: Management makes estimates and assumptions affecting reported amounts and disclosure of contingent assets. Actual results could differ significantly.

cash_and_equivalents.description: Highly liquid instruments with original maturity of 90 days or less. No cash equivalents held as of either period end.

accounts_receivable.description: Consists mainly of royalty and advertising fund revenues from franchisees. No reserve for doubtful accounts as of September 29, 2024.

revenue_recognition.description: Royalty and advertising fees recognized when food items are delivered to or carried out by customers. Royalties up to 4% and advertising up to 1% per FY2023 notes (discrepancy with FDD body rates of 5% and 3%).
revenue_recognition.payment_terms: Generally due and collected within 7 days of prior week-end date.

franchise_agreements_intangible.description: Franchise agreements transferred from related party, determined to have finite life, amortized straight-line over 10 years.

advertising_fund_accounting.description: Contributions recognized as revenue. Expenditures included in advertising expense. Excess contributions over expenditures recorded as accrued expense. No profit recognized. Timing differences may affect net income.

income_taxes.election: S-corporation for Federal and state purposes
income_taxes.federal_tax: None — income passes through to stockholders
income_taxes.uncertain_tax_positions: None identified. Follows guidance on uncertain tax positions (more-likely-than-not threshold). No liability recorded.
income_taxes.tax_years_open: 2023 and forward for both Federal and states

fair_value_measurements.description: Financial instruments include cash, accounts receivable, and receivables from related party. Fair value does not differ materially from carrying values.

concentration_of_credit_risk.description: Cash balances in excess of FDIC limits. Each of the 6 franchisees constitutes more than 10% of revenues and receivables. Loss of any franchisee would significantly impact operations.

recent_accounting_pronouncements.description: Adopted ASU 2016-13 (CECL) on January 17, 2023 using modified retrospective method. No reserve necessary. No impact to financial statements.

related_party_transactions.description: Company does business with related party entity under common control. Advances funds on short-term basis based on liquidity needs. No set repayment schedule, no interest. Presented as contra-equity.
related_party_transactions.shared_services: Receives management, administrative, and operational services from affiliate. No expense recorded.

subsequent_events.description: In December 2024, advanced $500,000 to related party. In January 2025, advanced additional $200,000 to same related party.

items_not_present.impairment: No impairment charges or policy described (no long-lived tangible assets)
items_not_present.lease_accounting: No leases held by franchisor entity
items_not_present.going_concern: Not raised in auditor report or notes
